context_notes: Session completed: gap closure (v4-09) + re-audit. v4-09 fixed all 3 previous audit gaps (schedule 405, back-to-site 405, orphaned settings.html). Re-audit found NEW critical issue: Tailwind CSS is never loaded in base.html — 35 templates use Tailwind utility classes with no CSS definitions. Also found 4 unsatisfied requirements: VIS-02 (dark mode), MIG-01/02/03 (migration audit). User needs to decide: fix Tailwind + MIG requirements, or accept as tech debt and complete milestone.
